# CTFrameProgression.rightToLeft

**Case**

Lines stack right to left for vertical text.

## Declaration

```swift
case rightToLeft
```

## Constants

- **CTFrameProgression.topToBottom**: Lines stack top to bottom for horizontal text.
- **CTFrameProgression.leftToRight**: Lines stack left to right for vertical text.
